scenes.description: Vestia Zeta introduces the full set of her birthday merchandise, briefly mentioning each item.
Detailed look at the "Angelic Zeta" Acrylic Diorama Stand.
Detailed look at the Vestia Zeta Haori.
Detailed look at the Sleepy Cat Zzz Plushie.

subtitles.english: Birthday Commemoration Full Set

subtitles.original: That's so cool!
subtitles.english: That's so cool!

subtitles.original: So we have Acrylic Diorama...
subtitles.english: So we have Acrylic Diorama...

subtitles.original: ...which you can put on your table.
subtitles.english: ...which you can put on your table.

subtitles.original: Definitely, we're gonna get into it,

subtitles.original: Terus nggak norak gitu loh guys.
